subcodes.title: Words to M. R. Shirazi in April 1914
subcodes.first_line: No atom can succeed without help and assistance. Everything in this world depends upon the assistance of others.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness
